notes: 首个公开版本。菜单栏查看你名下多个 Claude / Codex / z.ai(GLM) 订阅的额度窗口,不弄乱 CLI 登录。更新后如提示重新授权钥匙串,属未签名正常现象。
notes_en: First public release. See usage windows for every Claude / Codex / z.ai (GLM) subscription you own, right in the menu bar — without touching your CLI logins. If macOS re-prompts for Keychain access after an update, that's expected for an unsigned build.
